# HELP shorewalld_set_size Number of entries in a dynamic nft set.
# TYPE shorewalld_set_size gauge
shorewalld_set_size{set="blocked_ips"} 42.0
shorewalld_set_size{set="trusted_peers"} 3.0
# HELP shorewalld_dns_resolve_duration_seconds DNS resolution latency.
# TYPE shorewalld_dns_resolve_duration_seconds histogram
shorewalld_dns_resolve_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.005"} 10
shorewalld_dns_resolve_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.01"} 15
shorewalld_dns_resolve_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf"} 17
shorewalld_dns_resolve_duration_seconds_sum 0.35
shorewalld_dns_resolve_duration_seconds_count 17
# HELP node_conntrack_count Current number of conntrack entries.
# TYPE node_conntrack_count gauge
node_conntrack_count 128734
node_conntrack_max 4194304
